---
title: "SCVCS: The-Safe-and-Sustainable-by-Design (SSbD) Chips Value Chain Services"
subtitle: "EU-ASEAN Research Initiative for Sustainable Semiconductor Manufacturing"
page-layout: full
---

::: {.content-container .scvcs-background .welcome}
::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-lg-6 .welcome-text .sand-background style="padding: 20px; border-radius: 8px;"}

## About SCVCS

The **Safe-and-Sustainable-by-Design (SSbD) Chips Value Chain Services (SCVCS)** initiative is a cutting-edge research infrastructure designed to transform how the global semiconductor industry manages environmental, social, and governance (ESG) compliance while maintaining data sovereignty across transnational borders, thereby achieving the proposed Regenerative Socio-Technical (RST) roadmap by ensuring a global semcononduer-petro-chemical value chain that is regeneratively accountable, environmentally safe, and even geopolitically resilient.  

We tackle a critical challenge: bridging the disconnection between advanced manufacturing physics and absolute sustainability metrics through an **Atoms-to-Law** framework that integrates:

- **Physical metrology** (nanoscale fabrication)
- **Cybernetic governance** (edge-cloud computing)
- **Regulatory compliance** (EU policy frameworks)
- **Financial innovation** (green bonds & tokenized assets)

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-lg-6 style="padding: 20px;"}

### Key Innovations

::: {.feature-box style="background: #E8F4F8; padding: 15px; border-left: 4px solid #0078D4; margin-bottom: 15px;"}
**RealSoS Engine** Multi-rate cybernetic control loops for real-time yield & emission/footprint balancing
:::

::: {.feature-box style="background: #FFF4E6; padding: 15px; border-left: 4px solid #F0AD4E; margin-bottom: 15px;"}
**GuardSoS Gateway** Hardware-rooted Trusted Execution Environments for data sovereignty
:::

::: {.feature-box style="background: #E8F5E9; padding: 15px; border-left: 4px solid #28A745; margin-bottom: 15px;"}
**AuditSoS Framework** Regeneratively accountable accounting for Scope 3 emission and SSbD lifecycle footprints
:::

:::

:::
:::


---

## Our Vision

<div style="background: #F0F8FF; padding: 30px; border-radius: 8px; margin: 20px 0;">

### Transforming Semiconductor Compliance

Instead of **static paper disclosures** and **retrospective annual audits**, we deliver:

✓ **Automated, inline manufacturing compliance** integrated at every production stage  
✓ **Real-time environmental footprint tracking** from fabrication to end-of-life  
✓ **Hardware-secured autonomous governance** replacing trust-based human auditing  
✓ **Cross-border data sovereignty** respecting GDPR, CSDDD, and regional regulations  
✓ **Fundable digital product passports** enabling green finance integration  

</div>

---

## Research Objectives

::: grid
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### Objective 1: RealSoS
**Real-time Operational Sovereignty**

Edge-to-cloud computing continuum executing multi-rate cybernetic control loops for simultaneous yield and emissions optimization.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### Objective 2: GuardSoS
**Governance & Data Sovereignty**

Autonomous Policy-as-Code workflows in secure TEE enclaves managing cross-border compliance.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### Objective 3: AuditSoS
**Auditing & Asset Tokenization**

**Regeneratively accountable** and **environmentally safe** accounting leveraging certified digital product passports for sustainable supply chains.
:::
:::

---

## Partnership & Funding

SCVCS is seeking **EU-ASEAN research partners** and **funding collaborators** to:

- Participate in pilot deployments across advanced semiconductor fabrication lines
- Co-develop regional data governance frameworks
- Validate compliance automation tools with industry stakeholders
- Contribute domain expertise across physical metrology, cybernetics, policy, and finance

**[Learn More About the Project →](project.qmd)** | **[Meet Our Team →](team.qmd)** | **[Get in Touch →](contact.qmd)**
